svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="RBAC过滤器链与key对齐" id="rbacFilterChain1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-195" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="g1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#1e293b;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="过滤器链 · 顺序刻死（认证 → 租户解析 → 权限校验）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1100" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="请求进入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="120" x="80" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="① 认证
校验 token，挂当前用户" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="180" x="240" y="114" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="② 租户解析
注入 tenantId 上下文" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="180" x="460" y="114" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="③ 权限校验（枢纽）
读 @RequirePermission
按租户查权限表" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="210" x="680" y="106" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="放行 Controller" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="160" x="930" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ffail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="❌ 顺序错乱
租户上下文为空
→ 越权 / 全站不可用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="460" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ef1" edge="1" parent="1" source="f1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="f2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ef2" edge="1" parent="1" source="f2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="f3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ef3" edge="1" parent="1" source="f3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="f4" value="tenantId 就绪"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ef4" edge="1" parent="1" source="f4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="f5" value="命中"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="effail" edge="1" parent="1" source="f3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ffail" value="权限校验排到租户解析前"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#1e293b;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="权限 key 双向对齐 · 契约闸构建期核对" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="230" width="1100" x="40" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="k1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="接口 @RequirePermission
收集 key 集合 A" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="100" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="k2b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="权限种子数据（迁移脚本）
收集 key 集合 B" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="100" y="545" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="k3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="契约闸（枢纽）
构建期 A ∩ B 双向核对" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="220" x="490" y="478" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="k4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="构建通过" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="160" x="880" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="k5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="❌ A − B ≠ ∅
缺一个 key 即构建失败" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="880" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ek1" edge="1" parent="1" source="k1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="k3" value="扫描注解 key"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ek2" edge="1" parent="1" source="k2b" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="k3" value="读种子 key"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ek3" edge="1" parent="1" source="k3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="k4" value="集合相等"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ek4" edge="1" parent="1" source="k3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="k5" value="有差集"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1098px; height: 1px; padding-top: 13px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
